description: You are a Marketing Analyst performing a customer segmentation analysis on the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db) to identify revenue concentration. Calculate total lifetime revenue for each customer and segment them into 5 quintiles (1=Top 20% highest spenders, 5=Bottom 20%) using window functions. Aggregate the data to show Quintile, CustomerCount, TotalRevenue, and AvgRevenue per quintile, ensuring Quintile 1 represents the highest TotalRevenue. Export the results as a CSV with a header and exactly 5 data rows to /home/ga/Documents/exports/revenue_quintiles.csv and save the SQL analysis script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/quintile_analysis.sql.
